description: A list of group resources matching the request criteria.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#groupListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results in the result set.

items.description: A list of groups that match the request criteria.

A group resource represents a YouTube Analytics group, which is a custom collection of up to 500 channels, videos, playlists, or assets. You can use groups to simplify retrieving data for multiple resources.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#group.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the group.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the group.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the group was created.

title.description: The group title. The value must be a non-empty string.

contentDetails.description: Describes the content of a YouTube Analytics group in terms of the number of items it contains and the type of items it contains.

itemCount.description: The number of items in the group.

itemType.description: The type of resources contained in the group. Valid values are youtube#channel, youtube#playlist, youtube#video, and youtubePartner#asset.

title: GroupListResponse
